data_coverage_summary: Oracle Cloud SCM/Retail/TMS APIs has public documentation that indicates transportation planning and execution workflows across loads, shipments, routes, appointments. Public Oracle SaaS REST/API docs.
buyer_guidance: Use this API family for transportation planning and execution workflows rather than streaming vehicle telemetry. Oracle should be treated as a rest api surface for transportation planning and execution workflows.
overview: Public documentation reviewed for Oracle Cloud SCM/Retail/TMS APIs indicates Public Oracle SaaS REST/API docs. The documented surface aligns with transportation planning and execution workflows and covers loads, shipments, routes, appointments. Asset data is Supported. Telemetry data is Unsupported. Writeback is Supported.

available_data.description: The public documentation indicates transportation workflows for loads, shipments, routing, appointments, and carrier coordination.

ingest_considerations: The public source for Oracle Cloud SCM/Retail/TMS APIs is documentation-oriented, so live access still depends on vendor-issued credentials, tenant configuration, or customer enablement.
This row is modeled as transportation planning and execution workflows, so downstream integrations should scope data collection and writeback around those documented business workflows.
No exact public machine-readable JSON or YAML artifact was confirmed during this pass, so the documentation URL remains the primary evidence anchor.
